name: newpages-to-wordpress
description: Multi-tenant Newpages to WordPress migration platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w @np2wp/core && npm run build -w @np2wp/database && npm run build -w @np2wp/storage && npm run build -w @np2wp/newpages-adapter && npm run build -w @np2wp/wordpress-client && npm run build -w @np2wp/api && npm run build -w @np2wp/worker
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
